recommendations.title: Troll
recommendations.overview: When an explosion in the Norwegian mountains awakens an ancient troll, officials appoint a fearless paleontologist to stop it from wreaking deadly havoc.

recommendations.title: Walking Tall
recommendations.overview: A former U.S. soldier returns to his hometown to find it overrun by crime and corruption, which prompts him to clean house.

recommendations.title: The Legion
recommendations.overview: Noreno, a half-Roman, is entrusted with the mission of crossing the snowy mountains of Armenia, swarming with Parthian patrols, to seek help for his slowly dying men.

recommendations.title: The Crimes That Bind
recommendations.overview: When her son is accused of raping and trying to murder his ex-wife, Alicia embarks on a journey that will change her life forever.

recommendations.title: The Survivalist
recommendations.overview: In a time of starvation, a survivalist lives off a small plot of land hidden deep in forest. When two women seeking food and shelter discover his farm, he finds his existence threatened.

recommendations.title: Hunting Ava Bravo
recommendations.overview: Billionaire sportsman Buddy King unwinds by hunting human captives on his remote mountain estate. But his latest victim, Ava Bravo, is no easy target.

recommendations.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
recommendations.genres: Action, Science Fiction, Adventure, Comedy, Family
recommendations.overview: On a quest to find out what happened to his missing brother, a scientist, his nephew and their mountain guide discover a fantastic and dangerous lost world in the center of the earth.

recommendations.title: Flora & Ulysses
recommendations.overview: When Flora rescues a squirrel she names Ulysses, she is amazed to discover he possesses unique superhero powers, which take them on an adventure of humorous complications that ultimately change Flora's life--and her outlook--forever.

recommendations.title: The Forgotten Battle
recommendations.overview: During WWII's crucial Battle of the Scheldt, the lives of a glider pilot, a Nazi soldier and a reluctant Resistance recruit tragically intersect.

recommendations.title: Gold Diggers: The Secret of Bear Mountain
recommendations.overview: Two teen girls, one from the city, one from the country, try to find the hidden gold of Bear Mountain learning about friendship, loyalty and courage on the way.
